## AggregateReconstructionStatus Enum

Outcome classification for an aggregate state replay request\. Drives the HTTP status
and ProblemDetails mapping in the Admin replay surface \(Failure and HTTP Semantics
Matrix in admin\-ui\-aggregate\-state\-replay\-correctness story\)\.

```csharp
public enum AggregateReconstructionStatus
```

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionStatus.Succeeded'></a>

`Succeeded` 0

All requested events were applied successfully and [StateJson](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.StateJson 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionResult\.StateJson') is authoritative\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionStatus.Partial'></a>

`Partial` 1

Replay applied a contiguous prefix of events but stopped at [FailedSequenceNumber](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.FailedSequenceNumber 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionResult\.FailedSequenceNumber')\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionStatus.Failed'></a>

`Failed` 2

Replay could not produce trustworthy state\.
